top_signals.title: Iran Is Under Mounting Strain From US Naval Blockade
top_signals.summary: With ships trapped and oil revenue falling, Tehran has some tough choices ahead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How to get SpaceX stock — without buying the IPO
top_signals.summary: Investors will can hold SpaceX stock by virtue of owning shares in certain mutual funds and exchange-traded funds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Buy Toll, Sell Lennar as Rich Homebuyers Outpace First-Timers
top_signals.summary: An economy that’s been good for the rich makes shares of high-end homebuilders a better bet than those focused on entry-level buyers, according to one Wall Street analyst.

top_signals.title: Waymo launches premier subscription tier for $29.99 a month, starting in select cities
top_signals.summary: Waymo is offering a new subscription tier for power users, starting in San Francisco, Los Angeles and Phoenix
